name: HYDRA Regulatory Intelligence
description: Real-time regulatory intelligence for prediction markets. SEC, CFTC, Fed, FinCEN monitoring. Oracle data for UMA and Chainlink. 22 paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2.
